answers: Effective sales techniques include consultative selling, SPIN selling, and solution selling.

feelings.question: sales technique best practices
feelings.answer: Sales technique best practices include researching and planning the strategy, executing the plan based on results, and iterating to improve performance. These are some of the best practices for sales technique that can be applied in various industries and businesses.
